---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the OCS Inventory Agent
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm frustrated when..."

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case / Target Inventory Data
Explain the specific system info, hardware, or software data this feature will help inventory.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, or documentation links about the feature request here.
